# codewright

> AI context file for codewright v0.11.0
> Auto-generated by codewright. Update with `codewright context --llms`.

## Project Overview

- **Stack:** node
- **Framework:** -
- **Language:** pt-BR
- **Test Runner:** -
- **Key Directories:**
  - src/artifacts/writer.ts
  - src/cli/commands/ci.ts
  - src/cli/commands/context.ts
  - src/cli/commands/hook.ts
  - src/cli/commands/init.ts
  - src/cli/commands/review.ts
  - src/cli/commands/spec.ts
  - src/cli/commands/story.ts
  - src/cli/main.ts
  - src/config/loader.test.ts

## Commands

- Build: `npm run build`, `npm run dev`
- Test: `npm test`
- Lint: `npm run lint`

## Configuration

- Config directory: `.codewright/`
- Specs: `.codewright-output/specs/`
- Agent skills: `.agents/skills/`

## Key Files

- `package.json` - Project manifest
- `.codewright/config.yaml` - Codewright configuration
- `.codewright/config.user.yaml` - User overrides (gitignored)
- `.codewright/rules/DEFAULT.md` - Project rules
